header: Your editors see every element before they place it
description: No more guessing what a block will look like: all 255 Desiderio elements appear in the TYPO3 new-content wizard in 10 tidy groups, each with a live backend preview. Editors compose pages with confidence on day one — included in every tier, starting at €0.

image.title: Desiderio new-content wizard
image.alternative: TYPO3 new-content wizard listing all ten Desiderio element groups.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

features.text: 10 groups, from Hero to Leads & Conversion
A real preview for every single element
5 switchable icon libraries with stable keys
